name: French Vanilla Ice Cream #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine egg yolks, sugar replacement, and salt in the top of a double boiler.
2. Beat until frothy.
3. Add milk and vanilla bean; cook and stir over simmering water until thick and vanilla is dissolved.
4. Cool completely.
5. With an electric beater, beat well; then fold in topping.
6. Pour into freezer trays, cover with waxed paper, and freeze for 1 hour.
7. Scrape into a large bowl and beat until smooth and fluffy.
8. Return to freezer trays. Cover and freeze firm.
